examples: Living room divides into tearoom and guestroom.
Come into the warmth of the Fortnum and Mason tearoom.
And there is tearoom for tourist to drink the tea which is steepled by the spring water.
Certainly there were those who said he didn't do enough to chat up people in the tearoom.
Today the tearoom sticks to its roots, serving delicate pastries among palm trees and wicker furniture in an old-fashioned conservatory.
